title: Breaking barriers: HMCTS and Social Mobility

content.text: What does social mobility really look like inside HMCTS?

In this episode, Delivery Director Jane shares her journey from a working class background to senior leadership and explains the Social Mobility Strategy HMCTS has developed to ensure career opportunities in the justice system are for everyone. Social mobility ambassadors Jan and Zak then bring that strategy to life, telling us about the school visits, the conversations, and the moments that remind them why this work matters.
Listen to the latest episode now, available wherever you get your podcasts from!
A transcript of the podcast is also available.
